<Badge text="stripe-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="19 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> registry syntax and provenance still need verification before automated sync/install.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add docs.stripe.com@stripe-best-practices --skill stripe-best-practices -y -g
```

**Use:** `/stripe-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/stripe-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add docs.stripe.com@stripe-best-practices --skill stripe-best-practices -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: registry syntax and provenance still need verification before automated sync/install.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Stripe API and integration best practices for payments, billing, subscriptions, and webhooks. Note: registry provenance verification recommended per catalog notes. Evidence gathered from upstream SKILL.md, READMEs, and repo structure via web research.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add stripe/ai --skill stripe-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[stripe/ai](https://github.com/stripe/ai)

## Comparable Alternatives

A general-purpose agent instruction without a scoped skill contract

&gt; Web research of upstream repo (SKILL.md/contents); evidence only, not authority. Use external-skill-auditor for live verification before install or promotion. Not an endorsement.
